query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a dark interior space with a bright arched light source in the upper left corner. Gray forms occupy the right side and lower portion of the frame, with illuminated shapes visible near the light source.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, high-grain monochromatic abstract photograph with extreme underexposure, where crushed shadows and motion smear reduce forms to ghostly textures. A bright arched light glows in the upper left against oppressive darkness, while barely discernible shapes emerge from heavy film grain and shadow, evoking dread and unease.
